title: Lease, Acquire, or Develop Facilities: A sale-leaseback transaction allows a company to retain control of...
summary: Describe a sale-leaseback as selling property while retaining occupancy through a lease.
prompt: A sale-leaseback transaction allows a company to retain control of its property while generating immediate cash.
solution: In a sale-leaseback, a company sells its property to an investor and simultaneously leases it back, providing immediate liquidity while still operating from the same location.
